title: Esbjerg, Southern Denmark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Esbjerg, Southern Denmark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Esbjerg is a city in Southern Denmark with a population of 72,000. Denmark’s largest North Sea port, a wind energy hub with a striking Man Meets the Sea sculpture and sandy beaches.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
